proven.claim: PROVEN: totalViolations = sum of all c.violations.length
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1, P2, P6
; LINE: 439
; PROVEN: totalViolations = sum of all c.violations.length
(declare-const num_contracts Int)
(declare-const violations_0 Int)
(declare-const violations_1 Int)
(declare-const total_violations Int)
(assert (= num_contracts 2))
(assert (>= violations_0 0))
(assert (>= violations_1 0))
(assert (= total_violations (+ violations_0 violations_1)))
(assert (not (= total_violations (+ violations_0 violations_1))))
(check-sat)
; unsat → total_violations is computed by summation, always consistent
